Localization.Description: Events of the file and process analyzer

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The malicious process {subject.process.name} executed the file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The malicious file {object.name} is executed on host {event_src.host}
The suspicious process {subject.process.name} forked on host {event_src.host}
The file and process analyzer is started on host {event_src.host}
The malicious process {subject.process.name} created the file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The suspicious process {subject.process.name} connected to host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
The suspicious file {object.name} is executed on host {event_src.host}
The suspicious process {subject.process.name} copied the file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The malicious process {subject.process.name} forked on host {event_src.host}
A Windows Defender statistics event is received on host {event_src.host}
The malicious process {subject.process.name} copied the file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The process {subject.process.name} generated a memory dump file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The suspicious process {subject.process.name} sent a DNS query to host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
The process {subject.process.name} sent a DNS query to the C&C server on host {event_src.host}
The suspicious process {subject.process.name} executed the file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
Windows Defender detected malware on host {event_src.host}
The malicious process {subject.process.name} downloaded the file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The Microsoft Office suite process {subject.process.name} executed the process {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
A dump of the lsass process is generated on host {event_src.host}
The suspicious process {subject.process.name} created the file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The malicious process {subject.process.name} connected to host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
The malicious process {subject.process.name} sent a DNS query to host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
The process {subject.process.name} connected to the C&C server on host {event_src.host}
The file and process analyzer is stopped on host {event_src.host}
The suspicious process {subject.process.name} downloaded the file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
